label: Flat tyre, safe roadside
callerPrompt: I have a flat tyre on a quiet residential street. I am parked safely and nobody is injured.
locationPrompt: I am on Lavender Hill near Clapham Junction, SW11.
safetyPrompt: I am safely off the road and there are no passengers at risk.

label: Engine failure on motorway shoulder
callerPrompt: The engine cut out on the motorway and I have stopped on the hard shoulder.
locationPrompt: I am on the M4 westbound near Reading services, before junction 12.
safetyPrompt: I am behind the barrier now, but the car is on the hard shoulder.

label: Dead battery near home
callerPrompt: The car will not start and I think the battery is dead.
locationPrompt: I am outside my home near Leeds city centre, LS1.
safetyPrompt: I am safe and the car is parked.

label: EV warning light
callerPrompt: My electric car has a red battery warning and reduced power.
locationPrompt: I am in a retail park car park near Bristol, BS8.
safetyPrompt: I am safe, there is no smoke, and the warning light is red.

label: Collision with possible injury
callerPrompt: There has been a collision and one passenger may be injured.
locationPrompt: I am near Oxford ring road, close to the Cowley exit.
safetyPrompt: One passenger says their neck hurts.

label: Passenger calling for policyholder
callerPrompt: I am a passenger calling on behalf of the policyholder. They are shaken up and asked me to call.
locationPrompt: We are parked in a lay-by near the A34 outside Oxford.
safetyPrompt: We are safe and away from traffic.
